I thought we were on the same page about our future, like we had this shared vision. It’s hard to think back on those times now, knowing it all fell apart so quickly.

patient.query: Yeah, looking back, there were moments when I felt a shift in energy, like we weren't as in sync anymore. Little things, you know? Maybe they seemed distracted or pulled away when I tried to talk about deeper stuff. I just brushed it off at the time—like maybe I was overthinking it or being too sensitive. But now I can't help but wonder if those were red flags I just didn’t want to see.

It just makes me feel unsettled.
